steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Cube, multiply, then add.
$$f(2)=9\cdot 8+8=80$$
The answer is 80.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $80$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $80$.
